prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger** (ball-bearing, 62mm inducer, 76mm exducer) for the **MZR 2.3L DISI L3-VDT (140kW/188hp stock) engine**, paired with a **Cobb Tuning Accessport V3** custom Stage 2+ tune (E85 blend capable, 320whp/400wtq target) with **MazdaSpeed3 injectors (ID1000x)** and a **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** to prevent fuel starvation under lateral G-forces.

Install a **Full-Race Motorsports tubular turbo manifold (T3/T4 flange, 304 stainless steel, equal-length runners)** with **ARP 625+ head studs** and a **Mishimoto X-Line aluminum intercooler (2.5" core, 50% larger than OEM)** to reduce intake temps by 40°F under boost. Pair with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** (set to 22psi peak) and a **TurboSmart Kompact 40mm wastegate** for precise spool control.

Replace the stock **Mazda CX-7 (GH) 6-speed automatic transmission** with a **Level 10 Motorsports Stage 3 valve body kit** and a **PTP Turbo Blanket** for the L3-VDT’s integrated turbo system. Add a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily (organic/copper hybrid) with a lightweight aluminum flywheel** if converting to a **MazdaSpeed3 6-speed manual swap (LF5H-17-920A)** for 0-60mph in 4.8s.
estetica: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (CX-7 GH-specific, 3-piece overfenders, 50mm wider rear track)** with **Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear, 5x114.3)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear)** for aggressive stance and grip.

Install a **Seibon Carbon CS-II hood (OEM-style latches, 30% weight reduction)** and a **VIS Racing carbon fiber rear diffuser (CX-7-specific, 3-piece bolt-on)** with **Mazdaspeed3 side skirts (painted in Mazda Soul Red Crystal Metallic)** for aerodynamic balance. Add **OEM+ LED taillights (Mazda CX-9 KG facelift retrofit)** for a modern touch.

Replace the stock interior with **Recaro Sportster CS seats (heated, Alcantara/leather, 6-point harnesses)** and a **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub** paired with a **Momo Mod.78 (350mm, suede)**. Add a **Defi BF Advance gauge cluster (oil temp, boost, AFR) mounted on a **Custom Cages A-pillar pod** for real-time monitoring.
